summary: Backend API testing completed successfully. All 29 tests passed (100% success rate). Tested health check, auth (register/login/me), exercises (list/create), splits CRUD, workouts (create/list/last performance), analytics (summary/volume/strength/PRs), and user isolation.

minor.issue: Two test functions return values instead of None (pytest warnings). Not a backend issue, just test code style.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All endpoints properly use user_id for isolation
✅ JWT auth properly implemented with bcrypt password hashing
✅ Volume calculation accurate (sum of weight*reps for completed sets)
✅ Progressive overload suggestions working correctly (+2.5kg when reps>=8, +1 rep otherwise)
✅ Proper error handling with appropriate HTTP status codes
seed_data_creation: Test users created: TEST_user1@iron.com and TEST_user2@iron.com for user isolation testing. Multiple test workouts, splits, and exercises created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional. All CRUD operations, auth flows, analytics, and user isolation working correctly. 55 preloaded exercises seeded. JWT auth with bcrypt. MongoDB integration working. No issues found.
verified_features: Health check: GET /api/ returns 200 with status ok
Auth register: Creates user and returns JWT + user
Auth login: Returns JWT + user on correct creds; 401 on wrong
Auth me: Returns user with Bearer token; 401 without
Exercises list: Returns 55 preloaded exercises sorted by name
Custom exercise: Creates is_custom=true exercise tied to user_id
Splits CRUD: Create with day_id generation, list, get, update, delete all working
Splits user isolation: Returns 404 if not owned
Workouts: Creates with total_volume computed correctly
Workouts list: Returns sorted desc by finished_at
Last performance: Returns found=true with top_set and suggestion (+2.5kg if reps>=8, else +1 rep)
Last performance: Returns found=false when no history
Analytics summary: Returns total_workouts, total_volume, streak_days, this_week_volume
Analytics strength: Returns points array sorted ascending by date
Analytics PRs: Returns prs list sorted desc by weight
User isolation: Different user cannot access another user's splits/workouts
